case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. MELVA LUCIA ACOSTA BELTRAN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $656.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BELTRAN, MELVA LUCIA ACOSTA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-06-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MARIA BLANC ZOCO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DIANNE PEEBLES; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
